title: Earnings transcript reader output
description: Adapted from anthropics/financial-services @ 1c2ece3467c3434ddd01e655970e35b773940a29 — managed-agent-cookbooks/earnings-reviewer/subagents/transcript-reader.yaml. Apache 2.0 (preserved). Adapted 2026-05-09 for Mahoraga roles-as-tools: lifted the JSON schema verbatim so a Researcher leaf-worker that ingests an UNTRUSTED transcript or 8-K returns only schema-validated structured output. Pattern-bounded strings make prompt injection of control characters impossible.

actuals.description: Reported numeric metrics keyed by metric name (e.g. revenue, gross_margin, eps)
